coldsnap-analysis

Erica Griffin

2026-02-16

model1 <- lmer(Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment + (1 | Nest), data = coldsnap_df)
summary(model1)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment + (1 | Nest)
##    Data: coldsnap_df
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 458
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -2.75755 -0.51996 -0.05531  0.63689  2.25598 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Nest     (Intercept) 0.8853   0.9409  
##  Residual             0.5601   0.7484  
## Number of obs: 173, groups:  Nest, 30
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                  Estimate Std. Error      df t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)                       10.4699     0.2327 35.4776  45.001  < 2e-16
## Individual.TreatmentCold_Control  -1.6291     0.2805 73.1244  -5.808 1.53e-07
##                                     
## (Intercept)                      ***
## Individual.TreatmentCold_Control ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr)
## Indvdl.TC_C -0.618
res <- simulateResiduals(model1)
plot(res)

ggplot(coldsnap_df, aes(x = Individual.Treatment, y = Mean.TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, color = "pink") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, color = "pink") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Mean TRF"  )

model2 <- lmer(Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment + Mass + (1 | Nest), data = coldsnap_df)
summary(model2)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment + Mass + (1 | Nest)
##    Data: coldsnap_df
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 449.4
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -2.47688 -0.56623 -0.06708  0.64860  2.30405 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Nest     (Intercept) 0.8719   0.9337  
##  Residual             0.5328   0.7299  
## Number of obs: 171, groups:  Nest, 30
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                   Estimate Std. Error        df t value
## (Intercept)                       10.97171    0.75280 167.60595  14.574
## Individual.TreatmentCold_Control  -1.64733    0.27664  73.54285  -5.955
## Mass                              -0.02439    0.03712 157.95816  -0.657
##                                  Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                       < 2e-16 ***
## Individual.TreatmentCold_Control 8.23e-08 ***
## Mass                                0.512    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) I.TC_C
## Indvdl.TC_C -0.126       
## Mass        -0.952 -0.065
res <- simulateResiduals(model2)
plot(res)

now some temp models

ggplot(coldsnap_df, aes(x = incubation_max_temp, y = Mean.TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "pink", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Incubation Max Temp",
    y = "Mean TRF"
  )
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## Warning: Removed 18 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).
## Warning: Removed 18 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

ggplot(coldsnap_df, aes(x = incubation_below_18.5, y = Mean.TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "pink", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Incubation Days Below 18.5",
    y = "Mean TRF"
  )
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## Warning: Removed 18 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).
## Removed 18 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

ggplot(coldsnap_df, aes(x = incubation_avg_temp, y = Mean.TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "pink", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Incubation Average Temp",
    y = "Mean TRF"
  )
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## Warning: Removed 18 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).
## Removed 18 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

model3 <- glmer(Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment*incubation_max_temp + (1 | Nest), data = coldsnap_df)
## Warning in glmer(Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment * incubation_max_temp + :
## calling glmer() with family=gaussian (identity link) as a shortcut to lmer() is
## deprecated; please call lmer() directly
summary(model3)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML ['lmerMod']
## Formula: Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment * incubation_max_temp + (1 |  
##     Nest)
##    Data: coldsnap_df
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 398.5
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -2.42789 -0.56005 -0.04415  0.61658  2.50316 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Nest     (Intercept) 1.2410   1.1140  
##  Residual             0.4729   0.6877  
## Number of obs: 155, groups:  Nest, 30
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                      Estimate Std. Error
## (Intercept)                                           30.3891    10.3260
## Individual.TreatmentCold_Control                      17.0742    13.4586
## incubation_max_temp                                   -0.9008     0.4654
## Individual.TreatmentCold_Control:incubation_max_temp  -0.8575     0.6063
##                                                      t value
## (Intercept)                                            2.943
## Individual.TreatmentCold_Control                       1.269
## incubation_max_temp                                   -1.935
## Individual.TreatmentCold_Control:incubation_max_temp  -1.414
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) In.TC_C incb__
## Indvdl.TC_C -0.744               
## incbtn_mx_t -1.000  0.741        
## Ind.TC_C:__  0.743 -1.000  -0.740
res <- simulateResiduals(model3)
plot(res)
